positive: A stylized, symmetrical celestial floral wreath design, featuring detailed bioluminescent ferns, glowing stardust geometry, and intertwined mystical constellations. The composition must be centered and highly intricate, designed for a clean, repeating repeat print on fabric. Use deep indigo, sapphire blue, gold leaf accents, and vibrant teal tones. Style should be neo-sacred geometric linework mixed with detailed Art Nouveau botanical elements, creating a seamless, high-contrast silhouette pattern. Minimal shading, maximum clarity, perfect for screen printing.
negative: blur, artifacts, lowres, grain, text, watermark, signature, cropped, ugly, distorted, extra limbs, bad anatomy, noise, graffiti, logos, trademarks
